executives.name: David MacLennan
executives.background: Former Executive Chair and CEO of Cargill, Inc.

executives.name: John Zillmer
executives.background: Chairman of the Board of CSX. Chief Executive Officer of Aramark.

executives.name: Judson Althoff
executives.background: Judson Althoff is executive vice president and chief commercial officer at Microsoft. He is responsible for the sales strategy, execution and revenue growth of the company’s commercial business, which spans enterprise, public sector, small and medium businesses, services, and developer and partner communities.

executives.name: Lanesha Minnix
executives.background: Ms. Minnix has served as Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since June 2023. Prior to joining Flowserve, she served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Ecolab Inc. from March 2022 to June 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Lionel Nowell III
executives.background: Retired Senior Vice President and Treasurer of PepsiCo, Inc. Former Lead Director of Bank of America Corporation.
